descriptions.selectAccount: Select an account to authorize this application.
descriptions.redirecting: You will be redirected to the application's authorization page.
descriptions.loginRequired: Please log in to authorize the third-party application.

accounts.noAccounts: No accounts available for OAuth authorization

footer.disclaimer: By continuing, you authorize the application to access your Evolution account.
footer.revoke: You can revoke this access at any time in your account settings.

errors.noAccounts: No accounts available for OAuth authorization
errors.missingOAuthUrl: OAuth URL missing. Please restart the OAuth flow.
errors.missingUrlForAuth: OAuth or return URL missing for authorization
errors.failedToRedirect: Failed to redirect to login page

descriptions.requestingAccess: An application is requesting access to your account.
descriptions.needLogin: You need to log in to authorize this application.

footer.disclaimer: By authorizing, you allow this application to access your Evolution account with the requested permissions.
footer.revoke: You can revoke this access at any time in your account settings.

errors.missingParamsOrAuth: Missing OAuth parameters or user not authenticated

success.title: Success!
success.message: Authorization completed successfully! You can close this window.

errors.title: Error
errors.invalidCallback: Invalid OAuth callback - authorization code missing

footer.canClose: This window can be safely closed after authorization.
